The '''1997 Castleford Tigers season''' was the [[Castleford Tigers|club]]'s 2nd year in the [[Super League]]. The club finished in 10th place. Castleford Tigers also competed in the [[Challenge Cup]], but were knocked out in the Fourth Round by [[Salford Red Devils|Salford Reds]].
